validated_commands.test: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -x -q
validated_commands.test_full: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -q
validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv --break-system-packages && python3 -m uv sync --extra dev
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'python3 -m uv'. Do NOT use --cov: PyYAML global state corruption. Rich outputs ANSI codes even with NO_COLOR=1; strip with regex.

coverage_baseline.notes: All 6675 tests pass as of 2026-04-29 main after fix to test_policy_status.py.

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic \x1b[3m, bold \x1b[1m) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex r'\x1b\[[0-9;]*[A-Za-z]' to strip before text assertions. Add _strip_ansi() helper. Fixed in test_policy_status.py in PR 2026-04-29.
lockfile_format_note: Lockfile is apm.lock.yaml (LOCKFILE_NAME constant). Tests should write apm.lock.yaml.

testing_backlog.notes: Large complex file ~2804 lines. Core install logic. High risk. Deferred.
list/tree/info covered. Main update() orchestration still complex.

completed_work.description: Fixed 7 pre-existing test failures in test_policy_status.py. _ascii_only lacked ANSI stripping. Added _strip_ansi() helper. 6675 tests pass.
